name: Hawaiian Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and margarine together until smooth.
2. Add the mashed bananas and beaten eggs to the mixture. Mix thoroughly.
3. Sift the flour, salt, and baking soda into a bowl three times.
4. Gradually blend the sifted ingredients into the banana mixture. Be careful not to overmix.
5. Pour the batter evenly into two greased 9x5x3 inch loaf pans.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Bake the bread for 55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove the bread from the pans and cool immediately on a wire rack.
